function.name: nav_search
function.description: Search the project knowledge graph for symbols, concepts, rules, and wiki pages. Set all=true to include the knowledge layer.

all.description: Include concepts, rules, decisions, wiki (default: false)

by_docstring.description: Search docstring content instead of names

function.name: nav_explain
function.description: Full picture for any named node — all inbound and outbound relationships across code and knowledge layers.

file_path.description: Optional — narrow to a specific file

function.name: nav_function
function.description: Load context for a function — callers, callees, and decorators.

function.name: nav_class
function.description: Load context for a class — methods, inheritance chain, and references.

function.name: nav_context
function.description: All symbols in a file — functions, classes, imports — with line numbers and docstrings.

function.name: nav_concept
function.description: Load a business concept — governing rules, related concepts, implementing code, and wiki references.

function.name: nav_domain
function.description: Show everything in a business domain — code and knowledge nodes.

function.name: nav_decorated
function.description: Find all functions/methods carrying a specific decorator (e.g. login_required, cached).

function.name: nav_query
function.description: Execute a raw Cypher query against the knowledge graph. Returns JSON.

function.name: nav_stats
function.description: Node and edge counts broken down by type — shows what's in the graph.

function.name: nav_ingest
function.description: Ingest a code repository into the knowledge graph (AST parsing + call graph).

path.description: Absolute path to the repository root
